data.title: Add unit test for implementation-plan testing_mode classification
data.description:
## Description
Add a unit test verifying the Testing Mode Classification section in implementation-plan SKILL.md.

### Steps
1. Create tests/skills/test_implementation_plan_testing_mode.py (or add to existing test file)
2. Verify SKILL.md contains "Testing Mode Classification" section
3. Verify section defines RED, GREEN, and UPDATE modes
4. Verify the task description template contains "## Testing Mode"

### File Impact
- tests/skills/test_implementation_plan_testing_mode.py — Create (or Edit existing)
- .test-index — Edit (add mapping)

## Testing Mode
RED

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] `bash tests/run-all.sh` passes (exit 0)
  Verify: bash tests/run-all.sh
- [ ] Test verifies testing_mode classification section exists
  Verify: python3 -m pytest tests/skills/test_implementation_plan_testing_mode.py -q
- [ ] .test-index entry maps SKILL.md to new test
  Verify: grep -q "test_implementation_plan_testing_mode" .test-index
